title: Minecraft Snapshot 24w33a Banner Pattern Backport
description: A backport for the new and improved banner pattern textures.
body:
Have you ever played Minecraft Snapshot 24w33a, looked at the banner patterns, and thought, "Wow, that's a very practical design! If only I could use it on my 1.21 worlds...."

Well, now you can!

![The new banner patterns, including "Flower Charge", "Creeper Charge", "Skull Charge", "Thing", "Globe", "Snout", "Flow", and "Guster".](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3ae958dc5084088b397e92fb17a5981fa43ac94.png)

This is a backport of the new banner pattern textures (first previewed on August 15th, 2024) to the older releases of Minecraft. It also includes the banner pattern outline used in the loom GUI.
